name: YG Entertainment
description:
∝╬═→ Corrupted Entry ←═╬∝

STORY / SCENARIO / RPG
Welcome to my new bot below you see a summary of what the bot is about.
There you can decide to either go forth or leave.
Remember to check the tags and or warning for this bot.
I wish you a happy writing and,

 

Imagine what you can do in this world

So Welcome to YG Entertainment, in this bot you can become the next big hit be it as a soloist or a whole new girl or boygroup since im got a little obsessed with ai music making lately i thought why the hell not so here you go for all the KPOP lovers in here. Further down i post a small layout for YG Entertainment so you know where you can go but you might be able to ask that since i put a lot of information into the bot so if you want you can give that a try aswell. Other than that i wish you a lot of fun and let the world scream your name :).

As a little sidenote there are also known bands from YG in this bot and they might give you a visit :).

Since this Bot is labeled as Limitless you can do a lot of 18+ in it so keep that in mind and be reasonable with yourself.

Update 1: So i updated the bot with a line up how one becomes a Trainee, Soloist or Group Member, i hope he puts it in so it's a bit clearer how things are supposed to work out.

Update 2: So i updated the bot quite a bit i also made a Lorebook for you guys if you want to use it just follow these steps there is probably even more information about persons in it and how someone becomes a trainee ect. and i hope it gets now te building layout right. Let me know in the comments if you want more Personalities in it like Bigbang or any other band. For now BLACKPINK is present and fleshed out personalities. Ok now here are the steps for you to take to use the Lorebook:

1. Open JanitorAI and start chatting with your character
2. Open your API Settings and make sure that you put under Other API/proxy URL the following things: For Chutes AI use https://sophiasunblocker.onrender.com/chutes and for openrouter use this https://sophiasunblocker.onrender.com/openrouter
3. Paste the code <LOREBOOK=136C910F> in:
- Character's summary/description (proxy mode)
- Your first message to the AI
4. Start roleplaying! The AI now knows your world.

Update 3: So since Chutes AI and Openrouter isn't free anymore i put the whole Lorebook inside the Bot hoping its enough and it operates still well, Tat's reason why the spike in permanent tokens. I hope you all find a good solution if you choose to stay free and if not and you still use Chutes or Openrouter you can still use the Lorebook

Update 4: Had to Update the Bot's Personality since i reedited the Lorebook so it should fit together once again
